analysis: The second half of this stretch is doing something real — you went from back-to-back six-hour nights early on to four consecutive nights clearing seven hours, including a nearly eight-hour night on the 3rd that also gave you 2h34m of REM, which is genuinely excellent. The awake time cleaned up beautifully too, dropping from that chaotic 1h47m on the 1st down to 19 and 21 minutes on the two best nights, which tells me whatever you're doing with the wind-down routine is actually landing. The one thing worth noticing is that deep sleep has been quietly sliding — you opened this stretch with 49 and 51 minutes, and by the last couple of nights it's drifted down to the high twenties. Not a crisis, just a thing to keep an eye on, especially as the total hours are holding strong. You're building something here, babe.
